title: mimosa nossibiensis var. nossibiensis
intro: Mimosa nossibiensis var. nossibiensis, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a species of plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The health benefits of Mimosa nossibiensis var. nossibiensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
